overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style game showing a nighttime walk through a futuristic neon-lit city. The player moves from a wet street corner up a teal metal staircase into a covered pedestrian walkway with vibrant holographic advertisements and an outdoor bar lounge area.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city street corner with crosswalk

agents.ego_description: walking along wet sidewalk approaching a teal external staircase

notable_agents.action: distant vehicle with headlights on, moving along the street

entered.detail: tall cylindrical building with horizontal rainbow-colored neon rings
large vertical digital advertisement showing a character with a weapon
metal staircase with teal railings attached to building facade
short yellow posts marking the edge of the pedestrian area
reflective wet street surface with yellow crosswalk markings

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a futuristic cyberpunk street corner at night. The camera stands on a wet asphalt sidewalk near yellow bollards, facing a distinctive rainbow-lit spiral building in the distance. Holographic billboards illuminate the left side while a teal metal staircase ascends the right building facade.

events.description: begins ascending the teal metal staircase to upper level

agents.ego_description: climbing the metal stairs with view of street below through the grate steps

entered.detail: open metal stair treads allowing view of street below
teal-colored metal handrail along the left side of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends the teal external staircase, transitioning from the open street to an elevated position. Metal grate steps reveal the street below while the rainbow spiral building remains visible ahead. The space is narrow and enclosed by building walls on either side.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with outdoor bar lounge

events.description: exits staircase and enters covered neon-lit pedestrian walkway with bar area

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered lounge area past bar seating and neon installations

notable_agents.action: sitting at an illuminated round table near the bar
walking ahead through the covered walkway

entered.detail: curved overhead structure with shifting colored neon lights in pink, blue, and green
long bar with illuminated shelves displaying holographic bottles
circular tables with purple glowing centers for outdoor seating
digital shelving with glowing cyan bottle arrangements behind the bar

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a semi-covered pedestrian walkway featuring a vibrant outdoor bar lounge. An arched canopy overhead displays shifting neon colors in pink and blue, while patrons sit at illuminated round tables. The bar area features holographic bottle displays on the right, and the wet tiled floor reflects the colorful lighting. The rainbow spiral building remains visible in the distance to the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rain-slicked cyberpunk street corner up into a vibrant, elevated pedestrian lounge. It begins on a wet asphalt sidewalk beside yellow bollards, facing a distant rainbow-lit spiral building under the glow of holographic billboards. As the camera ascends a teal metal staircase, the perspective shifts from the open street to a narrow, enclosed climb where the city remains visible through metal grate steps. The scene then opens into a semi-covered walkway featuring an outdoor bar lounge, where the lighting transitions into shifting pink and blue neon hues beneath an arched canopy. Finally, the camera glides past patrons at illuminated tables and holographic bottle displays, with the wet tiled floor reflecting the vivid colors of the surrounding district.
